---
name: Specification issue
about: An error, contradiction or gap in the documents under docs/
title: ""
labels: spec
---

**Where**

Document and section, e.g. `docs/routing.md`, "Three stages".

**What's wrong**

The contradiction, gap or error, stated concretely. Quote the text you mean.

**Why it matters**

What would go wrong if someone implemented the spec as written.

**Suggested fix** (optional)

If you can see the repair, sketch it. For anything that changes behavior rather than fixing an error, use an RFC instead — see CONTRIBUTING.md.
